is the mascot for the American professional football team the [Philadelphia Eagles](/wiki/Philadelphia_Eagles "Philadelphia Eagles"). He is a [Bald eagle](/wiki/Bald_eagle "Bald eagle") wearing a [sports jersey](/wiki/Jersey_(sport) "Jersey (sport)") of the Philadelphia Eagles.[[1]](#cite_note-Philadelphia_Eagles_Mascot-1)

["Philadelphia Eagles Mascot"](http://www.philadelphiaeagles.com/fanzone/swoop.html). Philadelphia Eagles. [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20130313162636/http://www.philadelphiaeagles.com/fanzone/swoop.html) from the original on March 13, 2013. Retrieved March 3, 2013.

["swoop-cp1.jpg"](http://prod.static.eagles.clubs.nfl.com//assets/images/imported/PHI/photos/centerpiece/swoop-cp1.jpg). [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20160307075940/http://prod.static.eagles.clubs.nfl.com//assets/images/imported/PHI/photos/centerpiece/swoop-cp1.jpg) from the original on March 7, 2016. Retrieved January 19, 2018.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Mascot for the NFL's Philadelphia Eagles

For other mascots, see [Swoop (mascot)](/wiki/Swoop_(disambiguation) "Swoop (disambiguation)").

| Swoop | |
| --- | --- |
| Swoop at the [Super Bowl LII](/wiki/Super_Bowl_LII "Super Bowl LII") Victory Parade in 2018 | |
| Team | [Philadelphia Eagles](/wiki/Philadelphia_Eagles "Philadelphia Eagles") |
| Conference | [National Football Conference](/wiki/National_Football_Conference "National Football Conference") |
| First seen | 1994 |
| Website | [Swoop website](https://www.philadelphiaeagles.com/fans/swoop) |

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/42/Philadelphia_Eagles_Mascot_Swoop.jpg/250px-Philadelphia_Eagles_Mascot_Swoop.jpg)](/wiki/File:Philadelphia_Eagles_Mascot_Swoop.jpg)

Swoop on the gridiron in 2009

**Swoop** is the mascot for the American professional football team the [Philadelphia Eagles](/wiki/Philadelphia_Eagles "Philadelphia Eagles"). He is a [Bald eagle](/wiki/Bald_eagle "Bald eagle") wearing a [sports jersey](/wiki/Jersey_(sport) "Jersey (sport)") of the Philadelphia Eagles.[[1]](#cite_note-Philadelphia_Eagles_Mascot-1)

## Fictional biography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Swoop_(Philadelphia_Eagles)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Fictional biography")]

Hatched in the quiet Eagles Forest of [Neshaminy State Park](/wiki/Neshaminy_State_Park "Neshaminy State Park"), Swoop was a bald eagle with poor eyesight and strength, but a "strong and true" heart.[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2) The bird gained a humanoid appearance and size after a [Philadelphia Eagles](/wiki/Philadelphia_Eagles "Philadelphia Eagles") fan gave him a [jersey](/wiki/Jersey_(sport) "Jersey (sport)") that increased his strength, and his vision grew to match his heart.[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2) Hoping to help others, he became an overseer of the Eagles community.[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2)

## Appearances

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Swoop_(Philadelphia_Eagles)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Appearances")]

During the [NFL](/wiki/NFL "NFL") regular season, Swoop regularly appears as an animated character in the weekly [Eagles Kids' Club](/w/index.php?title=Eagles_Kids%27_Club&action=edit&redlink=1 "Eagles Kids' Club (page does not exist)") television show. During the Emmy-award-winning show's run from 2005–2010, the animated version of Swoop has been serving as a host of this show.

Swoop is best known for his stunts during the [Philadelphia Eagles](/wiki/Philadelphia_Eagles "Philadelphia Eagles") Football Games such as zip lining across [Lincoln Financial Field](/wiki/Lincoln_Financial_Field "Lincoln Financial Field") parachuting into the stadium. He has been seen sporting a pink wig for [breast cancer awareness](/wiki/Breast_cancer_awareness "Breast cancer awareness").[[3]](#cite_note-3)

Swoop made a cameo appearance in an [NFL Shop](/wiki/NFL_Shop "NFL Shop") commercial where a thief disguised as a kangaroo mascot tried to steal Philadelphia Eagles jerseys from the locker room after a game. Swoop walks into the locker room and the kangaroo tries to escape, but the security guards catch it. Swoop also made a cameo appearance in the 1994 comedy film *[Ace Ventura: Pet Detective](/wiki/Ace_Ventura:_Pet_Detective "Ace Ventura: Pet Detective")*, where Ventura beats the mascot after the latter shooed away an albino [pigeon](/wiki/Pigeon "Pigeon").[[4]](#cite_note-4)
